description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push to master and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix job that runs on ubuntu-latest, windows-2019, and macos-10.15 with Python versions 3.7 to 3.10, and architectures x64 and x86. For each job, check out the repository, set up Python, install dependencies, build Cython extensions, create a source distribution or wheel, and run tests with coverage on Ubuntu with Python 3.9. Upload artifacts and release to PyPI on tag pushes.
